title: Secure partner/steward + publish synthesis to a real audience; outcome recorded (the deed)
context: An Elyos deed is delivered, not merged: the synthesis/ledger must be used by or handed to a real audience or partner. This M5 task secures a partner/steward (open-science org, library/archive, university group, or open-knowledge community), records the use/hand-off, and flips verifiedNeed to true - driven by a dated partner-acquisition plan with a continue-vs-mothball/pivot decision rule so the loop never runs forever for no audience. No partner is yet secured.
objective: Secure a real partner/audience that adopts or publishes the synthesis/ledger, assign a steward, record the use/hand-off and flip verifiedNeed to true, driven by the dated partner-acquisition plan and applying the continue-vs-mothball/pivot decision rule if no partner is secured by the deadline.
acceptanceCriteria: A real partner/audience (open-science org, library/archive, university group, or open-knowledge community) adopts or publishes the synthesis/ledger; steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true; the use/hand-off is recorded
Driven by the dated partner-acquisition plan (>= 3 candidates in conversation by 2026-09-30, steward by 2026-12-31)

If none secured by ~2027-03-31, apply the continue-vs-mothball/pivot decision rule (pivot to an open-knowledge community as a reusable tool/reference corpus, or mothball: pause the loop, freeze + publish the ledger as a final-state artifact) - recorded in governance, never loop forever for no audience
Reviewed and signed off by the steward + maintainer (recorded)
